summary: Added 6 new events: Pistahan Parade & Festival (Aug 8-9), Half Moon Bay Art & Pumpkin Festival (Oct 17-18), Great Dickens Christmas Fair (Nov 21-Dec 20), Renegade Craft Fair SF Holiday (Nov 14-15), SF Coffee Festival (Nov 7-8, Fort Mason — ideal coffee/bakery fit), Winter Fancy Food Show (Jan 2027, B2B trade show). Total events: 36. Several spring/early-summer events have now passed and are candidates for removal (see summary).
